emails.subject: Re: 12/5/00 errors
emails.body: Re: 12/5/00 errors 474520 Should not be $210. Actually, Bob just changed the deal to $307, so it was in wrong, but he said Prebon's price is totally off. 474593 Again, we had the price wrong, but so did Prebon. Mallory just changed it to $210. These last two deals are in now 474604 and 474605. Thanks, Kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/05/2000 02:29 PM
